description: Perform a spatial join between the point layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson) and the polygon layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson) to determine which polygon each point falls within. The output must include the 'name' and 'area_sqkm' attributes from the polygon layer for each point. Export the final joined result as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/points_with_polygon_info.geojson.
